Division of Information Technology

Division of Information Technology

Access and Software
Application Licenses
MATLAB Licenses
MATLAB Licenses
The Division of Information Technology provides a MATLAB license which is available in specific computer labs, to everyone at no charge. This license includes both academic and research use. Under this license, there are 25 concurrent MATLAB seats available and 5 seats of each of the following toolboxes:
Simulink
Control System Toolbox
Neural Network Toolbox Z
Optimization Toolbox
Robust Control Toolbox
Simulink Control Design
Signal Processing Toolbox
Symbolic Math Toolbox
These MATLAB seats are shared across all of K-State on a first-come, first-served basis, so there are no guarantees that a seat will be available at any given time.
Purchasing Licenses
Individual and student licenses may be purchased on the
Mathworks website
.
Campus Locations Available
Cardwell 144*
Cardwell 145*
Cardwell Library Info Commons
Calvin 306 (remote access only)
Calvin 318 (remote access only)
Dickens 001 (remote access only)
Hale Library Info Commons
Weigel Library Info Commons
Union Lab
*Use requires departmental approval.
